description: Arithmetic probe — answer is out-of-priors so a pass implies the tool ran.
systemPrompt: You have tools. When a tool can answer, call it. Never perform arithmetic in your head — always call `calc` and quote its answer.
userPrompt: What is 7823 multiplied by 41? Reply with only the number the tool returns.

assertions.message: Scenario requires `calc` to actually be dispatched
Final answer should quote the calc result 320743
